emails.subject: Brownsille-Request for additional data
emails.body: Guys: Here are some items that Duke is looking for. Please let me know if you have any idea where they can be found. Some may be in DealBench that I am currently going through to find. Thanks agian for your assistance. Ben 3-7998 Forwarded by Benjamin Rogers/HOU/ECT on 12/05/2000 07:23 PM Don Miller 12/05/2000 05:14 PM

emails.subject: Re: Brownsille-Request for additional data
emails.body: Re: Brownsille-Request for additional data Ben: Brownsville SPCC plan The plan is currently in draft form. It will be finalized and signed by the end of the week. Emergency Response Plan We are not required to have one by law. However, I believe we do have one for the site. Mitchell- please have your assistant make a copy and send it to Ben. CEMS QA/QC Available at the plant, Mitchell will provide a copy CEMS certification report Should already be on DealBench Monthly log of emissions as required by condition #4 of the permit, Available at the plant, Mitchell has already given Duke a copy for the month of October when they were on-site yesterday. Annual Emissions Report (condition #11) We submitted two semi-annual reports for the site so far, one on January 31, 2000 and another on July 31, 2000. Mitchell will provide copy of the July report and the January report if available. The January report covers emissions for the third and fourth quarters of 1999. This is really the annual report for 1999 because we did not operate in the first and second quarters of 1999. Duke already saw the July report covering January through June 2000. Gus Benjamin Rogers@ECT 12/05/2000 07:25 PM
